info.title: Crack402 Sandbox API
info.description: API for managing cloud sandboxes with x402 payment support

TenantApiKey.name: X-API-Key
TenantApiKey.description: Tenant API key for sandbox operations

OperatorApiKey.name: X-Operator-Key
OperatorApiKey.description: Operator API key for management operations

started_at.description: ISO 8601 start timestamp, null if not started

message.example: The requested sandbox does not exist

gpu.description: GPU type, null for no GPU

idle_timeout_seconds.description: Idle timeout before auto-pause/destroy in seconds

auto_pause_on_idle.description: Pause sandbox when idle instead of destroying

code.description: Inline code to execute on start

token.description: GitHub access token for private repos

github_repo.description: GitHub repo to clone into the sandbox

exit_code.description: Process exit code, null if still running

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 completion timestamp, null if still running

file_path.description: Path to a script file to execute

args.description: Arguments to pass to the command or script

stdin.description: Standard input to pipe to the process

path.description: Absolute file path inside the sandbox

files.description: Files and directories in the listed path

sandbox_id.description: ID of the sandbox this snapshot was taken from

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiration timestamp, null if no expiry

override_env_vars.description: Environment variables to override from the snapshot

override_timeout_seconds.description: Override the timeout from the snapshot

total_vcpu.description: Total vCPUs available on the node

sandbox_ids.description: IDs of active sandboxes on this node

error.description: Error message if status is error
Error message if status is failure

post.description: Provision a new sandbox with the specified configuration.

get.description: List all sandboxes for the authenticated tenant.
Retrieve details for a specific sandbox.

delete.description: Permanently destroy a sandbox and release its resources.

get.description: Long-poll until a sandbox reaches the desired state.

post.description: Transition a sandbox to the running state.
Gracefully stop a running sandbox.
Pause a running sandbox to save resources.
Execute code, a command, or a file inside a sandbox.

get.description: Retrieve the result of a previous execution.

post.description: Write a file to the sandbox filesystem.

get.description: List files in a directory within the sandbox.

post.description: Create a snapshot of a sandbox's current state.
Create a new sandbox from an existing snapshot.

get.description: List all exposed ports for a sandbox.

post.description: Register a new webhook endpoint to receive event notifications.

get.description: List all registered webhooks for the authenticated tenant.

post.description: Receive heartbeat from a node with resource usage information
Report a sandbox state change from a node
Report an execution event from a node

get.description: Long-poll for pending commands for a node

post.description: Acknowledge receipt of a command
Report the result of a command execution
Register a new compute node in the fleet

get.description: Get details for a specific node

delete.description: Unregister a node from the fleet

post.description: Set a node to draining status to prevent new sandbox placement
Restore a draining node to healthy status
Mark a node as cordoned

get.description: Get aggregated fleet status including node counts and resource utilization
Get the current scheduler strategy configuration

post.description: Create a new tenant with an initial API key

get.description: Get details for a specific tenant including quota usage

patch.description: Update tenant configuration and quota limits

post.description: Create a new API key for a tenant

get.description: List audit events for the authenticated tenant

schema.description: Maximum number of events to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get aggregated billing usage for the authenticated tenant
Get billing invoice records for the authenticated tenant
List audit logs for the authenticated tenant

schema.description: Maximum number of audit logs to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of audit logs to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get fleet-wide metrics including node counts and vCPU utilization
